name: glove-js
description: A JavaScript REPL for LLM tool use — expose an agent's capabilities as async functions in a tiny, sandboxed JS interpreter it drives with one execute_js tool. Tools become functions, results are plain data, top-level const/let persist across calls, big values stay out of context via elision, and a fuel budget bounds runaway work. Consumes the same ToolFn catalog as glove-lisp's function mode.
